title: Character Set Section
text: Character Set Section Each translation table can include up to 128 character sets (numbered 0 through 127). ^begin_set { CharacterSetNumber } { ^CHR { /8 } FONT_ Number { Description } } OutputCharacterCode { Number . } MetaCharacter | UnifaceMnemonic { Description } ... ^end_set Delimitors Mnemonic Explanation begin_set CharacterSetNumber Mark start of character set definition. end_set Mark end of character set definition. Arguments CharacterSetNumber —Number identifying the character set; optional. If omitted, the next sequential number (0-127) is assigned. Number —Uniface font number, which identifies a meta character set; value values are 0 through 7. For more information, see Character Set Mappings . OutputCharacterCode —Device characters to which Uniface chcarcters or functions are mapped. MetaCharacter —Character in the specified Uniface meta character set. UnifaceMnemonic —Uniface mnemonic code recognized by the device translation table compiler. For allowed mnemonics, see Device Translation Table Mnemonics . Description —optional description or comments. The following example shows some definitions from the standard USYSTERM table: ^^ USYSTERM (VT220) device display and printer definitions table BEGIN_SET begin normal ASCII set ^esc(B select ascii set selection ^chr font_0 map (32-126) to 0.(32-196) END_SET BEGIN_SET begin Multinational set ^esc(< select multination set selection ^chr font_1 map (32-126) to 1.(32-196) ) view_cc map copyright character END_SET BEGIN_SET begin special graphic set ^esc(0 select special graphic set selection ^chr font_7 (32-126) to 7.(32-196) a view_frame map FRAME character ` view_menu map MENU character b view_ht map HT (horizontal tab) c view_ff map FF (formfeed) d view_cr map CR (carret) l top_left map top Left corner w top_con map top connector k top_right map top Right corner q top_line map top line t mid_left map left middle corner n mid_con map middle connector u mid_right map right middle corner q mid_line map middle line m bot_left map bottom Left corner v bot_con map bottom middle connector j bot_right map bottom right corner q bot_line map bottom line x vert_left map left vertical line x vert_mid map middle vertical line x vert_right map right vertical line o view_top map view entity top line o view_mid map view entity middle line s view_bot map view entity bottom line ~ view_vert map view entity left/right vertical END_SET Copy Was this topic helpful?
